findings.evidence: Mathlib has `Setoid.lift_injective_iff_ker_eq_of_le` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Data/Setoid/Basic.lean:358` and `Setoid.quotientKerEquivOfSurjective` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Data/Setoid/Basic.lean:392`; the new proof at `Deck.lean:142-160` reproves the same first-isomorphism theorem for `r = MulAction.orbitRel (Deck p) E`.
findings.fix: Prove the relation equality/inequality against `Setoid.ker p` and derive this from `Setoid.lift_injective_iff_ker_eq_of_le`; similarly derive the equivalence using `Setoid.quotientKerEquivOfSurjective` plus `Quotient.congrRight`.
findings.issue: `orbitRelQuotientProj_injective_of_fiber_subset_orbit` is a special case of Mathlib's quotient-kernel criterion, so this creates parallel API for injectivity of a quotient lift.

summary: The quotient bookkeeping largely uses the right orbit relation, but the injectivity/equivalence API duplicates Mathlib's generic quotient-by-kernel machinery instead of reducing the fibre-orbit hypothesis to `Setoid.ker p = MulAction.orbitRel (Deck p) E`.
